About.title: About Me
About.description1: Software Developer experienced in creating web and mobile applications. Additionally, I am an Information Systems undergraduate at UFOPA with a technical degree in Informatics from IFPA. During high school (2018), I had my first contact with a programming language (C) and subsequently dedicated myself to Web Development. It was only at university that I encountered mobile development, and since then, I have been working in both areas. Parallel to projects, as a scholar and Director of Academic Training at the Information Systems Academic Center, I organize and teach programming short courses, workshops, and mentoring sessions, focusing on helping other students start their journeys in software development.

Footer.madeWith: Made with Next.js 16, Tailwind & Shadcn UI.

items.description: Development of web and mobile applications, having completed the forest inventory app: Promanejo. Currently developing an environmental and social management system for field data collection using dynamic forms.
